subject: feat(theme): add random theme on load toggle to burger menu
body:
New opt-in setting in the burger menu that randomizes the DaisyUI theme
on every page load/refresh. Off by default — users who want variety can
toggle it on, while everyone else keeps their chosen theme.

The randomization runs in the inline bootstrap script (before first paint)
so there's no flash. The chosen random theme is persisted to localStorage
so the theme picker indicator stays in sync.

Tags: ui, theme, feature
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
